zh.lifeSummary: Ellen Mowat of Montealto是John de Montealto和Unknown的女兒，於1292年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾。她於1310年之前與Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1338年在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年46歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭培爾笛卡爾 斯康。

nameMeanings.name: Mowat
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Caithness and Orkney): variant of   Mowatt  .

variants.name: Mowatt
meanings: Scottish (northeastern): habitational name from Mold (Flintshire), see Maude 1. The distinctive Scottish form of the name has arisen from a shift of stress in Mohaut from the second to the first syllable. In Caithness and Orkney, the surname is traditionally pronounced ‘Mode’.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: Ellen Mowat of Montealto was born in 1292, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of John de Montealto and Unknown. She married Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron before 1310, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1338, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 46, and was buried in Old Scone, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Ellen Mowat of Montealto est née en 1292, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de John de Montealto et Unknown. Elle a épousé Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron avant 1310, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1338, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Old Scone, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Ellen Mowat of Montealto wurde 1292 in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von John de Montealto und Unknown geboren. Sie hat vor 1310 in Scotland Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1338 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Old Scone, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Ellen Mowat of Montealto è nata il nel 1292 nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlia di John de Montealto e Unknown. Lei sposato Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron prima del 1310, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1338, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Old Scone, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Mowat of Montealtoは1292年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでJohn de MontealtoとUnknownの娘として生まれた。1310年以前にスコットランドでSir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1338年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで46歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアオルド スコンにて埋葬された。

ko.Ballegarno Castle, Ballegarno, Perth, Sc: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 퍼스
ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Mowat of Montealto(은)는 1292년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 John de Montealto(와)과 Unknown의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1310년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1338년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 드 스콘에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ellen Mowat of Montealto nasceu em 1292, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filha de John de Montealto e Unknown. Ela casou-se com Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron antes 1310, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1338, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Scone, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Ballegarno Castle, Ballegarno, Perth, Sc: пирт, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Ellen Mowat of Montealto родилась в 1292 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали John de Montealto и Unknown. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron перед 1310 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1338 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности олд скоун, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
